'''''Planka''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a Light Calamari Cruiser]].

==History==
It placed [[Mine Type B]]s in an attempt to capture the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] group [[Dagger (Assassin-class)|Dagger]]. However, two [[Missile Boat]]s arrived and destroyed the mines, allowing a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] to dock and repair the two corvettes. It was presumed that they destroyed the ''Planka''. The incident was recorded for future training [[Flight simulator/Legends|simulation]] missions for [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], namely [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
